response.justification: The candidate is a poor fit for this specialized role. His resume shows only a brief, 7-month C++ engagement from nearly a decade ago, falling far short of the 5-10 years of strong, hands-on C++ experience required. Furthermore, he lacks any experience in the specified financial domains like capital markets or fixed income, and his platform experience is primarily in web technologies and Linux, not the required Windows and SQL Server/Oracle environment. While a clearly capable senior developer, his skills and experience do not align with the core mandatory requirements of the position.
strengths: Broad experience as a polyglot developer across web, mobile, and desktop systems.
Strong background in modern development practices, including CI/CD, TDD, and DevOps.
Demonstrated communication and knowledge-sharing skills through workshops and public speaking.
concerns: Lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ development experience.
No experience in the required financial domains (Capital Markets, Fixed Income).
Minimal demonstrated experience with Windows development and the specified SQL Server/Oracle databases.
